web_results.title: US intervention in Somalia
web_results.description: Amnesty International concluded that the actual number of U.S. airstrikes conducted in Somalia exceeded officially reported figures, and that AFRICOM has repeatedly misclassified Somali civilians killed in these strikes as “terrorists".
